entry.title: New: RES25-281 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF TRAVEL AND RELATED EXPENSES, VALUED AT $2,271.20, TO THE CITY FROM THE BLOOMBERG HARVARD CITY LEADERSHIP INITIATIVE TO PARTICIPATE IN THE 2025 MANAGING TALENT IN CITY GOVERNMENT PROGRAM IN CAMBRIDGE, MASSACHUSETTS, ON SEPTEMBER 18, 2025.

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution as amended were adopted.

View on the council site
